passages.passage_text:
Directions (Q. Nos. 16-21) Read the following information carefully and answer the questions given below. A famous museum issues entry passes to all its visitors for security reasons. Visitors are allowed in batches after every one hour. In a day there are six batches. A code is printed on entry pass which keeps on changing for every batch. Following is an illustration of passcodes issued for each batch.

Batch I houses neat and clean liked are all by
Batch II by houses neat all are and clean liked
Batch III liked by houses clean and neat all are and so on

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step I read "it was the name bestowed upon him", then what would be the arrangement for Step VII?

choices.a: bestowed it was the name upon him
choices.b: him it name bestowed the was upon
choices.c: it was him the name bestowed upon
choices.d: upon the him was it bestowed name

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step VI reads "workers must take a stand against working", then what will be the last word of step III?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step III reads "the best way of promoting our sports", then what will be the arrangement of the input?

choices.a: best the sports way of our promoting
choices.b: our promoting the best sports way of
choices.c: sports best the of way our promoting
choices.d: of our best the way sports promoting

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If the given input is "it is good approach with care", then what will be Step IV?

choices.a: with approach it is a good care
choices.b: approach is a care good it with
choices.c: a good approach it is with care
choices.d: care with a good approach is it

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If passcode for the third batch is 'you succeed day and hard work to for', then what will be the passcode for the sixth batch?

choices.a: work hard to for succeed you and day
choices.b: hard work for and succeed you to day
choices.c: work hard for to succeed you and day
choices.d: hard work for to succeed you and day

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If 'visit in 15 should the we time 40' is the passcode for the fifth batch, '15 we the should visit 40 time in' will be the passcode for which of the following batches?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Naman visited the museum in the fourth batch and was issued a passcode 'to one rush avoid not do very run'. What would have been the passcode for him had he visited the museum in the second batch?

choices.a: rush do not avoid to run very one
choices.b: rush not do avoid to run very one
choices.c: avoid rush not do to run very one

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Kamal went to visit the museum in the second batch. He was issued a passcode 'length the day equal of an night are'. However, he could not visit the museum in the second batch as he was a little late. He, then preferred to visit in the fourth batch. What will be the new passcode issued to him?

choices.a: and of are night the length equal day
choices.b: and are of night the length equal day
choices.c: and of are night the equal day length
choices.d: and of are the night length day equal

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If passcode for the second batch is 'to come hard you did work and success', then what will be the passcode for the fourth batch?

choices.a: did success to you hard come and work
choices.b: did success you to hard come and work
choices.c: did success to you hard come work and
choices.d: did to success you hard come and work

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If the passcode issued for the last (sixth) batch is 'the pencil by all boys used are pen', then what will be the passcode for the first batch?

choices.a: pencil the pen are used by all boys
choices.b: pen the pencil used are by all boys
choices.c: pen the pencil are used by all boys
choices.d: pencil the pen are used all by boys
